about.title: Biography
about.subtitle: About
about.p1: I'm a software engineer who enjoys building things that actually work in the real world.
about.p2: I like solving complex problems, but what really motivates me is understanding how systems behave in production. Working in fintech taught me a lot about reliability, responsibility, and staying calm when things go wrong.
about.p3: Outside of code, I’m curious by nature. I enjoy learning, exploring new ideas, and improving how I think

contact.title: Contact
